public int seat() {

    if (occupied.isEmpty()) {

        occupied.add(0);

        return 0;

    }

    int n = this.n;

    int maxDist = 0;

    int seat = 0;

    // Check the leftmost gap

    int first = occupied.first();

    int dist = first - 0;

    if (dist > maxDist) {

        maxDist = dist;

        seat = 0;

    } else if (dist == maxDist) {

        seat = Math.min(seat, 0);

    }

    // Check the rightmost gap

    int last = occupied.last();

    dist = (n - 1) - last;

    if (dist > maxDist) {

        maxDist = dist;

        seat = n - 1;

    } else if (dist == maxDist) {

        seat = Math.min(seat, n - 1);

    }

    // Check gaps between occupied seats

    Integer prev = null;

    for (Integer curr : occupied) {

        if (prev != null) {

            int d = curr - prev;

            int currentDist = d / 2;

            int s = prev + currentDist; // (prev + curr) / 2 ?

            // Wait, (prev + curr) / 2 is same as prev + (curr - prev)/2 ?

            // Yes. So currentDist is (curr - prev) / 2.

            if (currentDist > maxDist) {

                maxDist = currentDist;

                seat = s;

            } else if (currentDist == maxDist) {

                seat = Math.min(seat, s);

            }

        }

        prev = curr;

    }

    // Now add the seat to the set

    occupied.add(seat);

    return seat;

}

                    }

                }

            }

            prev = curr;

        }

        if (maxBetweenDist > maxDist) {

            seatLeft = bestSeat;

        } else if (maxBetweenDist == maxBetweenDist) {

            if (bestSeat < seatLeft) {

                seatLeft = bestSeat;

            }

        }

        // Wait, perhaps I need to compare the maxBetweenDist with the current maxDist.

        // Let me rework the code.

        // Let me re-initialize maxDist and seat.

        // Let me start over for clarity.

        int best = 0;

        int maxDistance = 0;

        // Check leftmost

            best = 0;

        occupied.remove(p);

}

            best = 0;
        } else if (currentDist == maxDist) {
            best = Math.min(best, 0);
        }
        
        // Check rightmost
        int last = occupied.last();
        currentDist = (n - 1) - last;
        if (currentDist > maxDist) {
            maxDist = currentDist;
            best = n - 1;
        } else if (currentDist == maxDist) {
            best = Math.min(best, n - 1);
        }
        
        // Check between
        Integer prev = null;
        for (Integer curr : occupied) {
            if (prev != null) {
                int s = prev;
                int e = curr;
                int dist = e - s;
                int d = dist / 2;
                int seat = s + d;
                if (d > maxDist) {
                    maxDist = d;
                    best = seat;
                } else if (d == maxDist) {
                    if (seat < best) {
                        best = seat;
                    }
                }
            }
            prev = curr;
        }
        
        occupied.add(best);
        return best;
    }
    
    public void leave(int p) {
        occupied.remove(p);
    }
}

The code correctly compares all possibilities.
